conversation_starters.title: St. Paul's Dragon Divas: How dragon boat racing became medicine for breast cancer survivors
conversation_starters.summary: Uplifting local breast-cancer-survivor dragon boat team heading to international competition; work-safe and heartwarming. You could open with: 'Did you hear about the St. Paul dragon boat team of breast cancer survivors competing internationally?'
conversation_starters.description: A local dragon boat racing team is making waves as they get ready to compete on the international stage.

conversation_starters.title: Summer GDQ: The fundraiser that keeps on giving (and keeps on coming back)
conversation_starters.summary: Games Done Quick returned to Minneapolis for 10th year, raised $2.4M for charity — notable recurring metro event, work-safe. You could open with: 'Did you catch that gaming marathon in Minneapolis raised $2.4 million for charity?'
conversation_starters.description: The video game fundraiser for Doctors Without Borders USA returned to Minneapolis for the 10th year, raising $2.4 million dollars.

conversation_starters.title: As wildfires burn in northern Minnesota, one expert says there's reason for our changing weather
conversation_starters.summary: Northern MN wildfires — distant point hazards up-state, not a metro check-in, but conversation-worthy. You could open with: 'Have you been following the wildfires up north?'
conversation_starters.description: Climate scientist Dr. John Abraham says we've contributed by releasing heat-trapping gases for years.

you_should_know.title: Vance Boelter expected to be sentenced to life in prison Thursday for Minnesota lawmaker shootings
you_should_know.summary: Major outcome (sentencing) in high-profile MN lawmaker shooting case.
you_should_know.description: The U.S. Attorney's Office has called Boelter's crimes "among the most serious ever committed in the District of Minnesota."

you_should_know.description: The four recipients wrote a letter addressing their concerns.

you_should_know.title: Trump administration says it's deferring $1B in Medicaid payments to California and Minnesota
you_should_know.summary: Trump admin deferring $1B Medicaid to MN and CA — political-institutional action landing on the state. Fraud framing makes it dicey as opener; kept as you-should-know context.
you_should_know.description: The Trump administration says it's deferring over $1 billion in Medicaid payments to Minnesota and California because of suspected fraud and noncompliance.
